headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk (routine capex scale, not event-driven loss) — Waaree Energies commissions 3,000 MW solar module plant, boosting renewable capacity but with limited immediate ESG impact
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, GRI, and TCFD disclosure obligations; no penalties or deadlines activated.
No P/E compression or margin erosion; future revenue potential, but not at risk now.
Potential for lower cost of capital if EU Taxonomy alignment is leveraged, but no current impact.
